title: sporobolus asper var. drummondii
intro: Sporobolus asper var. drummondii, commonly known as prairie sandreed, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Sporobolus asper var. drummondii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile plant for various health remedies.
